description: Digital CSM teammate: Snowflake, Gainsight, KB, content build.

tools.name: query_csm_database
tools.description: Answer a natural-language question about CSM data (signals, accounts, rules, content) by generating and running a read-only SQL query.

tools.name: get_schema
tools.description: Return the relational schema available to natural-language queries.

tools.name: write_outcome
tools.description: Record a CSM decision (accept/edit/discard) on a review item for the learning loop.

tools.name: search_knowledge_base
tools.description: Search a knowledge base: voc, content_library, px_engagement, or csm_voice.

tools.name: get_account_context
tools.description: Get account profile, recent feedback, and open review items.

tools.name: create_review_task
tools.description: Route a draft or brief to the CSM review queue.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email outreach (auto-routes to review when the spec requires it).

tools.name: trigger_in_product_message
tools.description: Trigger an approved in-product prompt for a user.

tools.name: get_engagement_history
tools.description: Read in-product engagement history (what a user has been shown).

tools.name: gainsight_rest
tools.description: Call a Gainsight NXT REST endpoint directly (Company, Person, Timeline, Cockpit/CTA, PX); returns the real Gainsight response envelope.

tools.name: build_draft
tools.description: Generate a draft from approved content in the CSM's voice (Content Build).

tools.name: detect_signals
tools.description: Detect signals at or above the severity threshold for the manager's accounts.

tools.name: decide_next_best_action
tools.description: Deterministically decide the next best action for a signal.

tools.name: search_microsoft_365
tools.description: Search Microsoft 365 work data (Work IQ) for the manager.

tools.name: ask
tools.description: Ask Microsoft 365 Copilot a natural-language question, grounded in work data.
